summary: pytest now runs with pytest-cov defaults from pyproject.toml to emit XML/JSON line-rate receipts
tools.tests.coverage_guard enforces a 70% minimum (runner + preflight wire it in, default threshold now 0.70)
docs/agents.md instructs operators to run the guard; receipts logged under _report/agent/codex-tier2/2025-11-09-pytest-coverage-guard/
